text:
On Wed, Jun 16, 2010 at 17:20, Thomas Zander
<thomas.e.zander@googlemail.com> wrote:
> For now there is nothing wrong with this patch.

Correction, there is something.
mng is missing the lib version number and the patch leaves the problem
for mencoder.
Do not commit as it is.
I will submit a proper update soon.

R
